compressed_context:
CTX: SINGAPORE-RESIDENTS-40–74 WITHOUT SELF-REPORTED CHRONIC-DISEASE (2023)
DEF: DIAB-3Y=DIABETES-SCR≥1-IN-3Y; HYP-2Y=HYPERTENSION-SCR≥1-IN-2Y
DEF: CHOL-3Y=CHOLESTEROL-SCR≥1-IN-3Y
RESULT: ALL-3=62.6% ∧ DIAB-3Y=76.7%
  HYP-2Y=82.7% ∧ CHOL-3Y=74.7%
AGE-40–49: ALL-3=62.8% ∧ DIAB-3Y=72.8%
  HYP-2Y=82.3% ∧ CHOL-3Y=72.4%
AGE-50–59: ALL-3=63.3% ∧ DIAB-3Y=75.9%
  HYP-2Y=82.4% ∧ CHOL-3Y=74.4%
AGE-60–69: ALL-3=60.2% ∧ DIAB-3Y=79.8%
  HYP-2Y=82.8% ∧ CHOL-3Y=76.8%
AGE-70–74: ALL-3=66.0% ∧ DIAB-3Y=86.4%
  HYP-2Y=86.8% ∧ CHOL-3Y=83.1%
SEX-MALES: ALL-3=61.9% ∧ DIAB-3Y=77.2%
  HYP-2Y=81.7% ∧ CHOL-3Y=74.9%
SEX-FEMALES: ALL-3=63.3% ∧ DIAB-3Y=76.3%
  HYP-2Y=83.6% ∧ CHOL-3Y=74.6%
EDU-PRIMARY: ALL-3=51.6% ∧ DIAB-3Y=71.4%
  HYP-2Y=77.9% ∧ CHOL-3Y=68.8%
EDU-SECONDARY: ALL-3=55.6% ∧ DIAB-3Y=73.7%
  HYP-2Y=80.8% ∧ CHOL-3Y=70.5%
EDU-POST-SECONDARY: ALL-3=67.6% ∧ DIAB-3Y=79.5%
  HYP-2Y=84.6% ∧ CHOL-3Y=78.0%
ETHNIC-CHINESE: ALL-3=61.4% ∧ DIAB-3Y=76.5%
  HYP-2Y=81.2% ∧ CHOL-3Y=74.3%
ETHNIC-MALAY: ALL-3=52.6% ∧ DIAB-3Y=71.1%
  HYP-2Y=80.8% ∧ CHOL-3Y=68.3%
ETHNIC-INDIAN: ALL-3=78.4% ∧ DIAB-3Y=83.0%
  HYP-2Y=94.0% ∧ CHOL-3Y=83.9%
NOTE: HIGHEST-EDU PROXY→SES; PRIMARY=NO-FORMAL/PRIMARY/PSLE ∧ SECONDARY=SECONDARY/GCE-O/N ∧ POST-SECONDARY=GCE-A/POLY-DIP/DEGREE
